Sikh Pilgrimage to Pakistan · 2026–2027

Walk where
history was
written.

Curated, secure pilgrimage experiences for Canadian Sikh families

Private Groups  ·  Sacred Circuit  ·  Ancestral Journey

Who We Are

Built for families who take this seriously.

Baarik Travel & Tours Inc. is a Canadian registered travel operator specializing exclusively in Sikh pilgrimage to Pakistan. We handle everything — visas, permits, transport, security, and the PSGPC invitation letter — so your family can focus entirely on the journey.

We work with a maximum of 12 pilgrims per shared group and offer fully private charter options for sangat groups, families, and corporate wellness trips.

RCIC Regulated  ·  TICO Compliant  ·  PSGPC Partnered

The Sacred Circuit

Sacred Sites

Every major Sikh site in Pakistan. One journey.

More than 80% of all Sikh heritage sites are located in Pakistan. Our circuit covers the most significant — the geography of Guru Nanak's life.

Nankana Sahib, Punjab

Nankana Sahib

The birthplace of Guru Nanak Dev Ji. Gurdwara Janam Asthan marks the precise location — a complex of seven interconnected gurdwaras covering the milestones of the Guru's early life.

Hasan Abdal, Punjab

Panja Sahib

Built around the stone bearing Guru Nanak's handprint, Gurdwara Panja Sahib in Hasan Abdal is among the most visually striking and spiritually charged sites on the entire circuit.

Our Packages

Three ways to travel with Baarik.

The Sacred Circuit

From $3,200 CAD per person

  • 5 days · 4 nights · Lahore base
  • Nankana Sahib, Kartarpur, Panja Sahib
  • Small group (max 12 pilgrims)
  • PSGPC visa letter included
  • 4-star hotel twin share
  • All transport & gurdwara entry

Ancestral Journey

From $2,800 CAD

  • Flexible 3–10 days
  • Pre-trip village research
  • Dedicated fixer & translator
  • Photography documentation
  • Digital heritage report

Private Charter

Custom pricing

  • Your group · Your dates
  • 4–14 days, any size (min 6)
  • Bespoke itinerary
  • Armored transport available
  • Dedicated trip manager
